calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Determine The Existence Of The Trust; For An Order Confirming Property Owned By The Trust; And For Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Collette Davis appeared via zoom for Keona Morrison (petitioner).

Ms. Davis stated the bank has acknowledged the trust, and that she is requesting Ms. Morrison be appointed as trustee. A petition for order to determine existence of trust is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Counsel to submit an order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Xiao: Not reported.

Petition For An Order To Determine The Existence Of The Trust; For An Order Confirming Property Owned By The Trust; And For Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order To Determine The Existence Of The Trust; For An Order Confirming Property Owned By The Trust; And For Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gerald Kane appeared via zoom for Keona Morrison (trustee).

Discussion was held in regard to the proper venue and if it should be filed in Los Angeles County, that counsel should file a Heggstad petition in the proper venue, and that the trustee resides in Los Angeles County. Petition for order to determine existence of trust etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.

Petition For An Order To Determine The Existence Of The Trust; For An Order Confirming Property Owned By The Trust; And For Appointment Of Successor
